issues.title: AWS BedrockAnthropic3ChatModel token usage metrics are missing
issues.body:
**Bug description**
In the AWS BedrockAnthropic3ChatModel sync call the token usage metrics is not returned.
Also bedrock return other very important metric X-Amzn-Bedrock-Invocation-Latency that would be good to include in the spring ai response model

**Environment**
Last M3 version

**Steps to reproduce**
Make a simple call with the BedrockAnthropic3ChatModel 

**Expected behavior**
Have all response metrics that bedrock returns

Thanks in advance

comments.body: This model is no longer supported, api access has been changed to go through the converse APIs.
